syscalls.name: mkdirat
syscalls.description: Create a directory relative to a dir fd.

syscalls.name: faccessat
syscalls.description: Check file access relative to a dir fd.

syscalls.name: openat
syscalls.description: Open a file relative to a directory fd.

syscalls.name: readlinkat
syscalls.description: Read a symlink relative to a dir fd.

syscalls.name: newfstatat
syscalls.description: Get file status relative to a dir fd.

syscalls.name: kill
syscalls.description: Send a signal to a process.

syscalls.name: tgkill
syscalls.description: Send a signal to a thread.

syscalls.name: getrandom
syscalls.description: Fill a buffer with random bytes.
